question: Which countries rank in the top 10 for 2023 population, and on which continents are they located?

analysis.chart_type: horizontal bar chart with continent-based color coding
analysis.design_rationale: A horizontal bar chart provides an immediate visual ranking of the top 10 most populous countries. Coloring bars by continent offers at-a-glance understanding of which continents dominate global population rankings, while keeping the chart uncluttered for the overview-style data. The distinct color mapping by 'continent' encodes geographic information directly, supporting categorical visual comparison.
analysis.target_insight: Which countries have the highest 2023 population, and which continents those countries represent.

chart_encodings.other_aesthetics: Sort bars by population descending, annotate population values at end of bars

transformations: Sort rows by df['2023 population'] descending
suggestion.matplotlib_code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import matplotlib as mpl
df = pd.read_csv('csv_c_squared\269.csv')
df_top10 = df[df['rank'] <= 10]
df_top10 = df_top10.sort_values(by='2023 population', ascending=False)
continent_order = df_top10['continent'].unique()
continent_lut = {c: i for i, c in enumerate(continent_order)}
colors = mpl.colormaps['tab10'].resampled(len(continent_order)).colors
bar_colors = [colors[continent_lut[cont]] for cont in df_top10['continent']]
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 7))
bars = ax.barh(df_top10['country'], df_top10['2023 population'], color=bar_colors, edgecolor='black')
for i, (bar, value) in enumerate(zip(bars, df_top10['2023 population'])):
    ax.text(value + max(df_top10['2023 population']) * 0.01, bar.get_y() + bar.get_height()/2,
            f'{value:,}', va='center', ha='left', fontsize=10)
handles = [mpl.patches.Patch(color=colors[continent_lut[cont]], label=cont) for cont in continent_order]
ax.legend(handles=handles, title='Continent', loc='lower right', frameon=False)
ax.set_xlabel('2023 Population')
ax.set_ylabel('Country')
ax.set_title('Top 10 Countries by 2023 Population\nColored by Continent')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
